_note: First member-island end-to-end empirical receipt. All 7 G-gates exercised. Provenance chain complete. Bushel 31 Phase F / BP022 / 2026-05-03 AD.

real_world_twinning_anchor.cultural_descriptor: High-plains Wyoming: the land where 37 years of system-building took root. Agricultural heritage, open sky, self-reliance culture.
real_world_twinning_anchor.structural_descriptor: Semi-arid plains. Wind as the dominant physical force. Sparse infrastructure masking deep infrastructure (the kind you build yourself).

ghost_world_state.lore_summary: Wyoming Founder's Keep is the Ghost-World anchor for the Liana Banyan origin story. In lore-space it appears as a wind-carved mesa rising from a flat sea of Ghost-World prairie. At its summit: a Keep. Inside the Keep: the first Hexel ever assembled — unpolished, hand-fitted, water-channel imperfect. The Keep has stood since before HexIsle had a name. Members who find it discover that the oldest ideas are still running.
ghost_world_state.mechanic_class: Ouralis Tidal Mechanism (Innovation #3) — the Keep's tide cycle is set to 37 rotations (one per year of development). A full tide = one year of lore-time.
inhabitants: The Archivist (NPC) — holds all 146 original CAD files in Ghost-World crystalline form
The Waykeeper (NPC) — directs visitors to the appropriate canonical-7 island based on their Real-World assignment class
events: The Founding Storm (perpetual background event) — represents the 21-year IT development arc
The Kickstarter Tide (recurring, every 37 Ouralis rotations) — the Keep's tide resets and new Ghost-Items appear
welcome_decrees: What was the Keep called before the Waykeeper arrived? The name is lost. Decrees welcome.
A fourth visitor-class has been seen at the Keep gates but never documented. Who are they? Compose alongside.
The wind here carries messages. What message did you hear when you arrived? Your decree is law alongside the original.
ghost_world_state.real_world_twin_reference: Wyoming — Founder home base (symbolic_anchor in tensor_coordinate.location)

ip_ledger.note: Creator-keeps 83.3% per IP Ledger primitive. LB membership $5/year unchanged (membership-orthogonal). Marks economics are IP Ledger class.

deck_card_visit.provenance: Deck Card (durable JWT-class). Non-consumable. LB membership + cohort-class verified. Pheromone trail type: membership-credential.

guide_visit.provenance: Guide (endorsement-weighted mediated). Co-member vouched via Pheromone trust-anchor graph. Visible social trail created. Pheromone trail type: social-trust.

babylon_candle_visit.provenance: Babylon Candle (Marks-burn transient). Single-use. Marks burned: 1.00. IP Ledger credit fired to creator: 0.83 Marks (83.3%). Platform retained: 0.17 Marks (Cost+20%). Pheromone trail type: marks-economy. Credit-where-due confirmed.

pedestal_forum_decree.decree_text: The Waykeeper's name is Theodoros. He arrived before the first Kickstarter Tide, carrying a single Hexel he had built in Real-World Wyoming during the original prototyping run. He keeps it in a sealed glass case at the center of the Keep — the only physical artifact that has crossed the Ghost-World / Real-World boundary. Members who learn his name may ask to see it. He always says yes.
pedestal_forum_decree.immutability_verified: The original island spec in member_islands (island_id: b31f-0001-aaaa-bbbb-cc00dd00ee00) was NOT modified. The decree is appended in island_pedestal_forum_additions and has co-equal authority with the original. Theodoros now exists in both the original (unnamed Waykeeper NPC) and the decree (named Theodoros) simultaneously — this is the Law of the Medes and Persians. Both are valid.

marks_payout_cycle.calculation: (3 visits × 1.00 Marks × 4.0x multiplier) + 0.83 Babylon Candle credit = 12.83 Marks total
marks_payout_cycle.note: Creator receives 83.3% of visit-generated Marks. Babylon Candle credit already reflects 83.3% share. Platform Cost+20% implicit. Tier 6 multiplier: 4.0x. LB membership $5/year unchanged (membership-orthogonal — Marks economics are IP Ledger class).

Cross-island visit via routeCrossIslandVisit() with provenance chain preserved through visit_id → pheromone_trail_id → burn_id → ip_ledger_credit_row_id. Federation Memory Iceberg routing active. Bushel 31 Phase D.

augur_pricing_reconciliation.rationale: Bushel 31 contains Marks-class bounty multipliers (4.0x) and IP Ledger economics (83.3% creator-keeps / Cost+20% platform). LB membership pricing is $5/year and is UNCHANGED throughout this Bushel. The Augur-Pricing trigger was a false positive: membership-orthogonal context applies. Context exemptions met: 'pricing identical for all', 'membership-orthogonal'. No membership pricing change was introduced.
